text.title: Tech Radar (ThoughtWorks-style) Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Tech Radar (ThoughtWorks-style) output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: URL or path to blip-change log

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: quadrants populated with a typed value
blips populated with a typed value
review_cadence populated with a typed value
maintainers populated with a typed value
history_log populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
